What We Do

Complete Roofing Services

From a single slipped tile to a complete re-roof, our team delivers professional, long-lasting work backed by a no-mess, no-fuss approach.

New Roofs & Re-Roofing

Full roof replacements using quality slate, tile and concrete materials — built to last with proper ventilation and insulation.

Roof Repairs

Slipped, broken or missing tiles repaired quickly. We diagnose the cause — not just fix the symptom — so problems don't return.

Chimney Repairs & Repointing

Chimney rebuilds, repointing, lead flashing and pot replacements — keeping your chimney weatherproof and structurally sound.

Leadwork & Flashing

Specialist lead flashing around chimneys, valleys, dormers and abutments — properly dressed and pointed for long-term weatherproofing.

Gutters, Fascias & Soffits

UPVC gutter replacements, fascia and soffit installations. We help protect the eaves of your home from water damage and rot.

Flat Roofs & Felting

EPDM rubber and felt flat roofing for extensions, garages and outbuildings — clean installations with proper drainage.

Why Trowell Roofing

Honest Work. Done Properly.

We're a local roofing team built on a simple idea: turn up when we say we will, do the job properly, and leave the place tidy. No big chains, no pushy sales — just reliable roofing you can trust.

  • Free, No-Obligation Quotes

    Clear, written quotes — no hidden extras, no pressure to commit.

  • Fully Insured Work

    Full public liability insurance, so you and your property are protected throughout.

  • Local & Reliable

    Based locally and well-known in the area — we rely on our reputation, so every job matters.

  • Clean, Tidy Workmanship

    We treat your home with respect — protective sheeting, daily clean-ups and a full tidy when we leave.
